expectedBehavior: Run the chatbot agent built with LangChain4j's ChatModel (AnthropicChatModel) instead of the raw Anthropic SDK. The demo launches the agent as a subprocess and asks what LangChain4j is; the agent should return a genuine, non-echoed AI-generated answer and end with stop reason END_TURN.
requiredOutput: Connected to LangChain4j ChatbotAgent (powered by Claude)!
